name: Hunter.io
description: Hunter.io — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice) tool for developers. Specializes in email tools.

seo.title: Hunter.io Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Hunter.io analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice).

review.verdict: Hunter.io is a Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice) tool.
pros: Multi-channel delivery (email, SMS, voice) from one API
cons: Per-message pricing adds up at high send volumes
review.best_for: Apps sending transactional notifications at scale
review.not_for: Small projects with minimal communication needs
